name: Andrew N’ Ivan
description:
ORIGINA ART BY CALA0221 ON DEVIANTART.

three shmucks in an apartment, one with mental disorders, one who constantly overworks themselves, and one misfit. What could go wrong? (Hint: everything.) [Sorry if it’s not exactly accurate to the whole game Bad Things, i haven’t played the game, and knowing how large the community for this game is, i’m bound to get some criticism, either constructive or straight up mean.]

recently got attached to the roblox game "Bad Things" so I decided, why not?
creator: MarkDatter
